message:
test(true_e2e): expand end-to-end test coverage

Comprehensive updates to true E2E tests:

cargo_build_tests.rs:
- Extended build scenario coverage
- New edge case tests

cargo_bench_tests.rs, cargo_check_clippy_tests.rs,
cargo_nextest_tests.rs, cargo_test_tests.rs:
- Updated test configurations
- Improved assertions

exit_code_tests.rs:
- Exit code verification improvements

ssh_command_tests.rs, ssh_tests.rs:
- Enhanced SSH command and connection tests

config.rs, mod.rs:
- Test configuration and module organization

build_rs_fixture_tests.rs (new):
- Tests for projects with build.rs files

fixtures/with_build_rs/ (new):
- New fixture project for build.rs testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
